sessions.summary: User received salary of ₹1,20,000 and committed to cutting food delivery spending in half (from ₹12,890 to ~₹6,445/month) and transferring ₹30,000 to their house fund on November 25th.
commitments: Cut food delivery spending in half to approximately ₹6,445/month
Transfer ₹30,000 to house fund on November 25th
insights: Food delivery is the second-largest expense category at ₹12,890/month, exceeding groceries, fuel, and entertainment combined
Upcoming committed bills total ₹46,500 (rent ₹25,000, MF SIP ₹10,000, internet/mobile ₹3,500, credit card ₹8,000)
House fund currently at ₹95,000 with a goal of ₹15 lakh in ~2 years, requiring approximately ₹62,500/month to hit target
Current savings pace is significantly below the monthly requirement needed to reach house fund goal
